intent: Execute Illumina DNA Prep protocol with magnetic bead-based tagmentation, performing DNA fragmentation with 20µL tagmentation mix at 55°C for 15 minutes, followed by adapter ligation with 10µL TSB at 37°C for 15 minutes, then conduct triple TWB washes (100µL each) with magnetic separation, amplify with 40µL PCR mix plus 10µL indexed barcodes using thermocycler (68°C/3min, 98°C/3min, then 5 cycles of 98°C/45s-62°C/30s-68°C/2min), perform dual AMPure cleanup (0.8x ratio, 45µL then 15µL) with ethanol washes, and elute final libraries in 35µL RSB buffer with magnetic separation and transfer to collection wells A10-A12

commands.message: THIS IS A NO MODULE RUN
THIS PROTOCOL WILL REUSE TIPS FOR WASHES
SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
